name: Brennan's Texas Creole Barbecued Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup barbecue sauce base (see recipe above)
recipeInstructions:
For the Sauce Base: In a saucepan, combine all ingredients and reduce liquid by half. Strain the liquid through a fine-mesh strainer and reserve.
For the Shrimp: In a skillet, sauté the peppers, onion, and garlic in oil over medium heat for about 40 seconds. Add the shrimp and sauté for 30 seconds. Stir in the barbecue sauce base. Add cream and simmer for 2 to 3 minutes until the shrimp are cooked.
To serve, arrange the shrimp, cornbread pudding, and jicama salad on each plate.
